market_overview.headline: Market showing divergent trends with SPY in pullback mode while QQQ holds unstacked bullish structure, but BTC in full bear creating risk-off environment.
market_overview.detail: 36% of stocks in Full Bull vs 26% in Full Bear, but tech weakness and crypto breakdown suggest defensive positioning warranted. SPY and QQQ both showing crossover risks at key EMA levels.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Technology Leading Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Storage and memory semiconductors dominating momentum with SNDK, WDC, and MU showing exceptional spread scores. Electronic technology sector maintaining 77.5% bullish participation despite broader market weakness.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Minerals Leading, Tech Services Deteriorating

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with strong momentum across energy commodity producers.
Mining and materials showing complete bullish dominance with 11.5% average gains vs 21W EMA.
Industrial support services maintaining perfect bullish structure amid economic strength.

weakest.note: Severe deterioration with 91% bearish participation, worst sector performance overall.
Complete bearish dominance in business services with -7.4% average performance.
Financial sector showing stress with majority in bearish structures despite some strength.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into cyclical materials and energy. Technology services collapse suggests defensive positioning while commodity sectors benefit from economic strength.

items.text: SPY and QQQ both showing bearish crossover risk at critical EMA levels with compressed spreads
BTC in full bear structure at -44.7% deviation from fair value creating crypto contagion risk
Technology services sector in complete breakdown with 91% bearish participation
22 bull breakdown signals indicate established uptrends starting to crack under pressure
